name: Praline Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, granulated sugar and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, brown sugar, and flour. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in vanilla.
4. Stir in chopped pecans. Pour over crust.
5. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F., and continue baking another 30 minutes.
6. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan. Chill.
7. Brush with maple syrup; top with pecan halves.
